package rulecoverage

func NegativeGinHandlerAcceptsMoreThanOneBodyContract() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_accepts_more_than_one_body_contract"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that try to bind or manually parse multiple body DTOs in one request path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
